title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the definition of creativity and ownership.

questions.question: Can a piece of art be considered 'great' if it was created by a computer?
Do you think traditional art galleries will disappear in the future?
Is the high price of some modern art justified, or is it just marketing?

script.text: Can a piece of art be considered 'great' if it was created by a computer?
Do you think traditional art galleries will disappear in the future?
Is the high price of some modern art justified, or is it just marketing?
Some people say that art is only valuable if it requires physical skill. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
